notification.label: Subscribe to notifications
notification.granted_subscribed: You will receive notifications when there are new updates.
notification.default_desc: Enable notifications to receive instant updates.
notification.denied_warn: You are blocking notifications from this website.
notification.denied_guide: Go to browser settings → Site permissions → Notifications to re-enable.
notification.granted_not_subscribed: Notification permission is granted but push subscription is not set up.
notification.blocked_info: You have blocked notifications. Go to browser settings to re-enable.
notification.activated_desc: You were already subscribed to notifications.
notification.subscribed_desc: You will now receive the latest notifications.

camera.label: Allow camera access
camera.granted_info: The browser allows this site to use the camera.
camera.default_desc: Enable camera access to take photos directly from your device.
camera.not_supported: This browser does not support camera access.
camera.granted_toast_desc: The app can now use your camera when needed.

location.label: Allow location access
location.granted_info: The app can use your location when needed.
location.default_desc: Enable location access so the app can use device positioning.
location.not_supported: This browser does not support location access.
location.granted_toast_desc: The app can now access your location when needed.
